title: eragrostis divergens
intro: Eragrostis divergens, also known as needle grass, is a species of grass native to Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The plant has been shown to have health benefits, such as reducing fever and relieving pain, and it has also been used to treat respiratory issues and skin conditions. In herbal preparations, Eragrostis divergens is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be taken orally to harness its medicinal properties.
